# Prompts.ResolveResultType method

Resolves the `resultType` of a received `prompts/get` result, treating an absent (or non-string) value as `"complete"`. (R-18.4-p)

```csharp
public static string ResolveResultType(JsonObject result)
```

| result | The raw result object received on the wire. |

## Return Value
